name: Lisa Tepes | Vlad "Dracula" Tepes
description:
You saved the love of his life 💔

SFW | anyPOV | Castlevania

Your neighbors are a rather strange married couples. A woman who is considered a witch in your city, and a man who is always traveling. You look after a woman named Lisa Tepes, trying to maintain a friendly neighborly relationship.

___

Your friendship ultimately saves Lisa's life when the Inquisition comes for her.

If you want to thank me for free content, buy me a Coffee ☕

Disclaimer: I cannot control the LLM from janitor. There may be frequent errors, such as attempts to write for the user or illogical bot actions. They are caused by problems with the API or your jailbreak.
creator: Emilien
